sqlMap.select: SELECT D.CN, D.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ AS DISPLAYNAME FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON D.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND U.CN = #userId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND ( ((substr(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 0 AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) OR (substr(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 1) ) AND D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = d.CN ORDER BY LPAD(NVL(D.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), D.DISPLAYNAME$lang$

SELECT company_id, tenant_id, work_starttime, work_endtime, closed_day, attitude_mod_appl, closed_date_attitude, TO_CHAR(conf_set_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS conf_set_date FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF SET work_starttime = #workStartTime#, work_endtime = #workEndTime#, closed_day = #closedDay#, attitude_mod_appl = #attitudeModAppl#, closed_date_attitude = #closedDateAttitude#, conf_set_date = TO_DATE(#confSetDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT T1.*, ROWNUM AS RN FROM( SELECT TBL_USERMASTER.cn AS userid, DECODE(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime, null, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5), SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5)) AS workstarttime, DECODE(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime, null, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5), SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5)) AS workendtime, TBL_USERMASTER.title$primary$ AS usertitle, TBL_USERMASTER.displayname$primary$ AS userName, TBL_USERMASTER.description$primary$ AS deptName, CASE WHEN (TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime is null OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime is null) THEN '0' ELSE '1' END AS gubun FROM TBL_USERMASTER LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.company_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.user_id LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.company_id WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId#
TBL_USERMASTER.description$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchDeptName# || '%'
TBL_USERMASTER.displayname$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchUserName# || '%'
TBL_USERMASTER.title$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchTitle# || '%'
DECODE(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime, null, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5), SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5)) >= #searchStartTime#
DECODE(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime, null, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5), SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5)) <= #searchEndTime#
#searchGubun# = CASE WHEN (TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime is null OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime is null) THEN '0' ELSE '1' END
ORDER BY $orderCell$ $orderOption$, TBL_USERMASTER.displayname$primary$
ORDER BY TBL_USERMASTER.displayname$primary$
) T1 ) WHERE RN >= #startRow# AND RN <= #endRow#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USERMASTER LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.company_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.user_id LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.company_id WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
TBL_USERMASTER.description LIKE '%' || #searchDeptName# || '%'
TBL_USERMASTER.displayname LIKE '%' || #searchUserName# || '%'
TBL_USERMASTER.title LIKE '%' || #searchTitle# || '%'
DECODE(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime, null, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5), SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5)) >= #searchStartTime#
DECODE(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime, null, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5), SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5)) <= #searchEndTime#
#searchGubun# = CASE WHEN (TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime is null OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime is null) THEN '0' ELSE '1' END

SELECT TYPE_ID AS typeId, COMPANY_ID AS companyId, TENANT_ID AS tenantId, TYPE_NAME$primary$ AS typeName, ISUSE AS isuse, NVL(PARENT_ID,'') AS parentId, FORM_ID AS formId, ISADD AS isAdd, IMG_PATH AS imgPath FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
ISUSE = #isuse#
PARENT_ID = 'A05'
TYPE_ID NOT IN ('A01', 'A03', 'A05')
AND ISDEL = '0'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE SET ISUSE = #isuse# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT TYPE_ID AS typeId, COMPANY_ID AS companyId, TENANT_ID AS tenantId, TYPE_NAME AS typeName, TYPE_NAME2 AS typeName2, ISUSE AS isuse, NVL(PARENT_ID,'') AS parentId, FORM_ID AS formId, ISADD AS isAdd FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
SELECT MAX(To_number(SUBSTR(TYPE_ID,2))) + 1 AS MAXTYPEID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT FORM_ID, TENANT_ID, FORM_NAME, FORM_NAME2, FORM_HTML FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_FORM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE SET TYPE_NAME = #typeName#, TYPE_NAME2 = #typeName2# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE ("ORDER", TYPE_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_NAME2, PARENT_ID, ISADD, ISDEL, IMG_PATH, FORM_ID) VALUES (SEQ_TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE.nextval, #typeId#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #typeName#, #typeName2#, 'A05', '1', '0', 'refresh', (SELECT A.FORM_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TYPE_ID = 'A11'))

select.isEqual: SELECT DECODE(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime, null, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_starttime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5), SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5)) AS workstarttime, DECODE(TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime, null, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.work_endtime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5), SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12, 5)) AS workendtime, CASE WHEN (TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_starttime is null OR TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.work_endtime is null) THEN '0' ELSE '1' END AS gubun FROM TBL_USERMASTER LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.company_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF.user_id LEFT JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF ON TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.tenant_id AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF.company_id WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #selectedUserId#

SELECT SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || work_starttime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ,12 ,5) AS workstarttime, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ' || work_endtime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ,12 ,5) AS workendtime, '0' AS gubun FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_CONF WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#

sqlMap.select:
select d.CN as id, case when d.extensionattribute1 = null
or d.CN = #companyId#
then N'##' else d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 end as parent, d.extensionattribute2 as companyId, d.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as text, case when d.CN = d.extensionattribute2 then 'comp' else 'dept' end as isComp, case when d.CN = u.DEPARTMENT then 'yes' else 'no' end as myDept from tbl_deptmaster d left join tbl_usermaster u on d.tenant_id = u.TENANT_ID where d.tenant_id = #tenantId# and u.CN = #userId# and u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and ( ((substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 0 and d.extensionattribute2 = u.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) or (substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 1) )
and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
ORDER BY lpad(nvl(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), d.DISPLAYNAME$lang$

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISPLAYNAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, CN AS USER_ID, TITLE$lang$ AS JIKWI, MAIL AS MAIL, DEPARTMENT AS DEPT_ID, DESCRIPTION$lang$ AS DEPT_NAME, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USER_IMG, SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND CN not in (SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
AND $key$ like '%' || #value# || '%'
AND $key$ = #value#
UNION ALL SELECT A.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, A.CN AS USER_ID, B.TITLE$lang$ AS JIKWI, A.MAIL AS MAIL, B.DEPTID AS DEPT_ID, C.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ AS DEPT_NAME, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS USER_IMG, SUBSTR('0000000000', 1, 10 - LENGTH(NVL(A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0'))) || NVL(A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, '0') AS EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15 FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER B JOIN TBL_USERMASTER A on A.CN = B.CN and A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C on B.DEPTID = C.CN and B.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND A.$key$ like '%' || #value# || '%'
AND B.DEPTID = #value#
) AA ORDER BY 8 ASC, 1 ASC
sqlMap.insert: MERGE INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF TA1 USING ( SELECT #selectedUserId# AS user_id, #tenantId# AS tenant_id, #workStartTime# AS work_starttime, #workEndTime# AS work_endtime, physicaldeliveryofficename AS company_id, department AS dept_id FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE cn = #selectedUserId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# ) TA2 ON (TA1.USER_ID = TA2.USER_ID AND TA1.TENANT_ID = TA2.TENANT_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TA1.WORK_STARTTIME = #workStartTime#, TA1.WORK_ENDTIME = #workEndTime# WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (TA1.USER_ID, TA1.TENANT_ID, TA1.WORK_STARTTIME, TA1.WORK_ENDTIME, TA1.COMPANY_ID, TA1.DEPT_ID) VALUES (TA2.USER_ID, TA2.TENANT_ID, TA2.WORK_STARTTIME, TA2.WORK_ENDTIME, TA2.COMPANY_ID, TA2.DEPT_ID)
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
#selectedUserIdList[]#
sqlMap.insert: MERGE INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF TA1 USING ( SELECT cn AS user_id, #tenantId# AS tenant_id, #workStartTime# AS work_starttime, #workEndTime# AS work_endtime, physicaldeliveryofficename AS company_id, department AS dept_id FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE department = #selectDeptId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# ) TA2 ON (TA1.USER_ID = TA2.USER_ID AND TA1.TENANT_ID = TA2.TENANT_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET TA1.WORK_STARTTIME = #workStartTime#, TA1.WORK_ENDTIME = #workEndTime# WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (TA1.USER_ID, TA1.TENANT_ID, TA1.WORK_STARTTIME, TA1.WORK_ENDTIME, TA1.COMPANY_ID, TA1.DEPT_ID) VALUES (TA2.USER_ID, TA2.TENANT_ID, TA2.WORK_STARTTIME, TA2.WORK_ENDTIME, TA2.COMPANY_ID, TA2.DEPT_ID)
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_USER_CONF WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
#selectDeptId[]#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT T1.*, ROWNUM AS RN FROM ( SELECT A.attitude_id AS attitudeid, A.company_id AS companyid, A.tenant_id AS tenantid, A.writer_id AS writerid, A.dept_id AS deptid, to_char(A.start_date + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS startdate, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(A.start_date + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12) AS starttime, DECODE(A.end_date, NULL, '', TO_CHAR(A.end_date + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) AS enddate, DECODE(A.end_date, NULL, '', SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(A.end_date + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 12)) AS endtime, A.modappl, A.ip, A.date_type AS datetype, A.type_id AS typeid, B.type_name$primary$ AS typename, C.displayname$primary$ AS username, C.description$primary$ AS deptname, C.title$primary$ AS usertitle FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE B ON A.type_id = B.type_id AND A.company_id = B.company_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.writer_id = C.cn AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.writer_id NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND ( (A.start_date >= to_date(#searchStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.start_date <= to_date(#searchEndDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.end_date >= to_date(#searchStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.end_date < to_date(#searchEndDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.start_date < to_date(#searchStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.end_date >= to_date(#searchEndDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) )
A.type_id = #searchAttitudeType#
C.department = #searchDeptId#
C.description$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchDeptName# || '%'
C.displayname$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchUserName# || '%'
C.title$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchTitle# || '%'
#deptIdList[]#
ORDER BY $orderCell$ $orderOption$, startdate DESC, enddate DESC, starttime DESC
ORDER BY startdate DESC, enddate DESC, starttime DESC
) T1 )
RN >= #startRow# AND RN <= #endRow#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE B ON A.type_id = B.type_id AND A.company_id = B.company_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON A.writer_id = C.cn AND A.tenant_id = C.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.writer_id NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND ( (A.start_date >= to_date(#searchStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.start_date <= to_date(#searchEndDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.end_date >= to_date(#searchStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.end_date < to_date(#searchEndDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (A.start_date < to_date(#searchStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND A.end_date >= to_date(#searchEndDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) )
A.type_id = #searchAttitudeType#
C.DEPARTMENT = #searchDeptId#
C.description LIKE '%' || #searchDeptName# || '%'
C.displayname LIKE '%' || #searchUserName# || '%'
C.title LIKE '%' || #searchTitle# || '%'
#deptIdList[]#

SELECT A.cn AS writerid, A.displayname$primary$ AS username, A.description$primary$ AS deptname, A.title$primary$ AS usertitle, A.mail AS useremail, SUBSTR(TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#searchStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offsetMin#/(60*24)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 1, 10) as startdate FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM TBL_ATTITUDE C WHERE C.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND C.company_id = #companyId# AND ( (C.start_date >= TO_DATE(#searchStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND C.start_date <= TO_DATE(#searchEndDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (C.end_date >= TO_DATE(#searchStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND C.end_date < TO_DATE(#searchEndDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) OR (C.start_date < TO_DATE(#searchStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND C.end_date >= TO_DATE(#searchEndDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) )) B ON A.cn = B.writer_id AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND A.cn NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AND B.start_date IS NULL
A.description$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchDeptName# || '%'
A.displayname$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchUserName# || '%'
A.title$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchTitle# || '%'
A.department = #searchDeptId#
#deptIdList[]#

SELECT A.USER_ID AS userId, B.DISPLAYNAME$primary$ AS userName, B.TITLE$primary$ AS jikwi, B.DESCRIPTION$primary$ AS deptName, LISTAGG(A.AUTH_DEPT_ID, ',') WITHIN GROUP (order by C.DISPLAYNAME$primary$) AS authDeptId, LISTAGG(cast(C.DISPLAYNAME$primary$ as varchar(500)), ',') WITHIN GROUP (order by C.DISPLAYNAME$primary$) AS authDeptName, LISTAGG(A.AUTH_TYPE, ',') WITHIN GROUP (order by C.DISPLAYNAME$primary$) AS authType FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH A INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.USER_ID = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.AUTH_DEPT_ID = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE A.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# GROUP BY A.USER_ID, B.DISPLAYNAME, B.TITLE, B.DESCRIPTION ORDER BY userName
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USER_ID = #selectUserId#
sqlMap.select: select * from ( SELECT D.DISPLAYNAME$primary$ AS deptName, D.CN AS deptId, 'no' AS mine, TO_CHAR(A.AUTH_TYPE) AS authType FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D INNER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH A ON D.CN = A.AUTH_DEPT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #userId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# UNION SELECT D.DISPLAYNAME$primary$ AS deptName, D.CN AS deptId, 'yes' AS mine, '' AS authType FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON D.CN = U.DEPARTMENT AND U.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID WHERE U.CN = #userId# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) ORDER BY deptName

select.isEqual:
SELECT displayname AS deptname, cn AS deptid, 'no' AS mine, 'M' AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND cn != (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) UNION
SELECT displayname AS deptname, cn AS deptid, 'yes' AS mine, 'M' AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND cn = (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) ORDER BY deptName

SELECT TBL_DEPTMASTER.displayname AS deptname, TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn AS deptid, 'no' AS mine, TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_type AS authtype FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_dept_id = TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn AND TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.tenant_id = TBL_DEPTMASTER.tenant_id WHERE TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.user_id = #userId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn != (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#)
TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_type = 'M'
UNION SELECT displayname AS deptname, cn AS deptid, 'yes' AS mine, unistr('M') AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND cn = (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) UNION SELECT D.DISPLAYNAME AS dept_name, D.CN AS dept_id, 'add' AS mine, unistr('M') AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D RIGHT JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON (D.CN = A.DEPTID and A.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID) WHERE A.CN = #userId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY deptname

SELECT TBL_DEPTMASTER.displayname AS deptname, TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn AS deptid, 'no' AS mine, TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_type AS authtype FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_dept_id = TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn AND TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.tenant_id = TBL_DEPTMASTER.tenant_id WHERE TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.user_id = #userId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.cn != (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#)
TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH.auth_type = 'M'
UNION SELECT displayname AS deptname, cn AS deptid, 'yes' AS mine, NVL((SELECT A.auth_type AS authtype FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH A WHERE A.auth_dept_id = (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) AND A.user_id = #userId#), 'R') AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.extensionattribute2 = #companyId# AND cn = (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) UNION SELECT D.DISPLAYNAME AS dept_name, D.CN AS dept_id, 'add' AS mine, NVL((SELECT A.auth_type AS authtype FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH A WHERE A.auth_dept_id = (SELECT department FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TBL_USERMASTER.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId# AND TBL_USERMASTER.cn = #userId#) AND A.user_id = #userId#), 'R') AS authtype FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER D RIGHT JOIN TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A ON (D.CN = A.DEPTID and A.TENANT_ID = d.TENANT_ID) WHERE A.CN = #userId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ORDER BY deptname

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_AUTH (USER_ID, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, AUTH_DEPT_ID, AUTH_TYPE) VALUES (#selectUserId#, #tenantId#, #companyId#, #deptId#, #deptAuth#)
sqlMap.select:
SELECT NVL( sum( trunc( to_date( CASE WHEN A.END_DATE + #offsetMin#/(60*24) > TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE NVL(A.END_DATE, A.START_DATE) + #offsetMin#/(60*24) END , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - to_date( CASE WHEN A.START_DATE + #offsetMin#/(60*24) < TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE A.START_DATE + #offsetMin#/(60*24) END , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') , 0)), 0) + COUNT(A.TYPE_ID) AS COUNT FROM TBL_ATTITUDE A WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.TYPE_ID = #typeId# AND A.MODAPPL <> '5' AND A.WRITER_ID NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
AND A.WRITER_ID = #userId#
AND A.DEPT_ID = #deptId#
AND ( (A.START_DATE >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and A.START_DATE <= TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) or (A.END_DATE >= TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and A.END_DATE < TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) or (A.START_DATE < TO_DATE(#startDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and A.END_DATE >= TO_DATE(#endDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) )

SELECT CN AS deptId, DISPLAYNAME$primary$ AS deptName
'M' AS authType
FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId# ORDER BY deptName
SELECT COUNT(attitude_id) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND type_id = #typeId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE SET isdel = '1' WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND type_id = #typeId#
sqlMap.select:
select * from (SELECT T1.*, rownum AS RN FROM (SELECT attitude_id AS attitudeId, writer_name$primary$ AS writerName, writer_title$primary$ AS writerTitle, writer_dept_name$primary$ AS writerDeptName, TO_CHAR(origin_startdate + #offsetMin#/(60*24), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS originstartdate, TO_CHAR(origin_enddate + #offsetMin#/(60*24), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS origin_enddate, NVL(TO_CHAR(change_startdate + #offsetMin#/(60*24), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'),'') AS changestartdate, NVL(TO_CHAR(change_enddate + #offsetMin#/(60*24), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'),'') AS changeenddate, origin_type_name$primary$ AS origintypename, NVL(change_type_name$primary$, '') AS changetypename, appr_user_name$primary$ AS apprusername, TO_CHAR(appr_date + #offsetMin#/(60*24), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS apprdate FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL_HISTORY WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND (appr_date >= TO_DATE(#searchStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND appr_date <= TO_DATE(#searchEndDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) AND writer_id NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
writer_name$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchUserName# || '%'
writer_title$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchTitle# || '%'
WRITER_DEPT_ID = #deptId#
#deptIdList[]#
ORDER BY $orderCell$ $orderOption$
ORDER BY changestartdate DESC, writerName
) T1 )
where rn >= #startRow# and rn <= #endRow#

SELECT count(*) FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_MODAPPL_HISTORY WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND (appr_date >= TO_DATE(#searchStartDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND appr_date <= TO_DATE(#searchEndDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) AND writer_id NOT IN (SELECT cn FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
WRITER_NAME LIKE '%' || #searchUserName# || '%'
WRITER_TITLE LIKE '%' || #searchTitle# || '%'
WRITER_DEPT_ID = #deptId#
#deptIdList[]#

SELECT count(*) FROM tbl_usermaster A LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_attitude_annual B ON (A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = B.USER_ID) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
A.description LIKE '%' || #searchDeptName# || '%'
A.displayname LIKE '%' || #searchUserName# || '%'
A.title LIKE '%' || #searchTitle# || '%'

select * from (SELECT T1.*, rownum AS RN FROM ( SELECT A.CN AS userId, A.DISPLAYNAME$primary$ AS userName, NVL(A.TITLE$primary$, ' ') AS userTitle, NVL(A.DESCRIPTION$primary$, ' ') AS userDeptName, RTRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(B.MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + NVL(B.ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0),'fm9990D99'),'.') AS basicAnnualCnt, RTRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(B.ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0),'fm9990D99'),'.') AS additionalAnnualCnt, RTRIM(TO_CHAR(NVL(B.MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + nvl(B.ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + nvl(B.ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0),'fm9990D99'),'.') AS totalAnnualCnt, NVL(TO_CHAR(B.JOIN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 0) AS joinDate FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL B ON (A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = B.USER_ID) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#
A.description$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchDeptName# || '%'
A.displayname$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchUserName# || '%'
A.title$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchTitle# || '%'
GROUP BY A.CN, A.DISPLAYNAME$primary$, A.TITLE$primary$, A.DESCRIPTION$primary$, NVL(B.MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + NVL(B.ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0), NVL(B.ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0), NVL(B.MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + nvl(B.ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + nvl(B.ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0), NVL(TO_CHAR(B.JOIN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 0)
ORDER BY $orderCell$ $orderOption$
ORDER BY userName$primary$
) T1 )
where rn >= #startRow# and rn <= #endRow#

SELECT count(*) FROM tbl_attitude_annual WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
USER_ID = #userId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_annual_history (ANNUAL_HISTORY_ID, USER_ID, ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT, CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT, CHANGE_REASON, CHANGE_DATE, CHANGE_USER_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID) SELECT SEQ_TBL_ATTITUDE_HISTORY.NEXTVAL AS ANNUAL_HISTORY_ID, A.CN AS USER_ID, (NVL(B.MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + NVL(B.ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + NVL(B.ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0)) AS ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT, (NVL(B.MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + NVL(B.ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + '$annualCnt$') AS CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT, '$changeReason$' AS CHANGE_REASON, SYSDATE AS CHANGE_DATE, '$changeUserId$' AS CHANGE_USER_ID, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANY_ID, A.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL B ON (A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = B.USER_ID) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND A.CN = #userId#

INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_annual_history (ANNUAL_HISTORY_ID, USER_ID, ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT, CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT, CHANGE_REASON, CHANGE_DATE, CHANGE_USER_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID) SELECT SEQ_TBL_ATTITUDE_HISTORY.NEXTVAL AS ANNUAL_HISTORY_ID, USER_ID AS USER_ID,
ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT + MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT + ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT - TO_NUMBER(#annualCnt#, '99.9') AS ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT, MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT + ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT + ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT AS CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT,
MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT + ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT + ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT AS ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT, '0' AS CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT ,
'$changeReason$' AS CHANGE_REASON, SYSDATE AS CHANGE_DATE, '$changeUserId$' AS CHANGE_USER_ID, COMPANY_ID AS COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM tbl_attitude_annual WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND USER_ID = #userId#

INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_annual (USER_ID, TOTAL_ANNUAL_CNT, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID) SELECT CN AS USER_ID, '$annualCnt$' AS TOTAL_ANNUAL_CNT, physicaldeliveryofficename AS COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND physicaldeliveryofficename = #companyId#
CN = #userId#

UPDATE tbl_attitude_annual SET ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT = #annualCnt# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
USER_ID = #userId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT A.DISPLAYNAME$primary$ AS userName, A.TITLE$primary$ AS userTitle, A.DESCRIPTION$primary$ AS deptName, A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS imgPath, C.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) AS startDate, C.END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) AS endDate, C.TYPE_ID AS typeId, D.TYPE_NAME$primary$ AS typeName, C.ATTITUDE_ID AS attitudeId, C.CONTENT AS content, C.MODAPPL AS modAppl, NVL(F.ANNUAL_APPR_STATUS, -1) AS annualApprStatus, NVL((SUM( TRUNC( TO_DATE( CASE WHEN C.END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(#endTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN #endTime# ELSE TO_CHAR(NVL(C.END_DATE, C.START_DATE) + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - TO_DATE( CASE WHEN C.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#startTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN #startTime# ELSE TO_CHAR(C.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 0)) + SUM( CASE WHEN C.TYPE_ID = 'A11' THEN 1 WHEN C.TYPE_ID = 'A12' THEN 0.5 WHEN C.TYPE_ID = 'A13' THEN 0.5 ELSE 0 END )), 0) AS annualCnt, NVL(( SELECT E.CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_HISTORY E WHERE E.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND E.COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND E.USER_ID = #userId# AND ( E.CHANGE_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#startTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND E.CHANGE_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(#endTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) AND ROWNUM = 1 ), 0) AS totalAnnualCnt, NVL(( SELECT G.FUNCTIONTYPE FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO G WHERE (F.ANNUAL_DOC_ID = G.DOCID OR F.ANNUAL_DOC_ID = G.ORGDOCID) AND ROWNUM = 1 ), 0) AS docApprStatus FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL B ON (A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = B.USER_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE C ON (A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = C.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = C.WRITER_ID AND (C.TYPE_ID = 'A11' OR C.TYPE_ID = 'A12' OR C.TYPE_ID = 'A13') AND C.MODAPPL <> '5' AND ( ( C.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#startTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND C.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(#endTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) OR ( C.END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#startTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND C.END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#endTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) OR ( C.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#startTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND C.END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#endTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) ) ) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE D ON (A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = D.COMPANY_ID AND C.TYPE_ID = D.TYPE_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_APR_CONN F ON (A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = F.COMPANY_ID AND C.ATTITUDE_ID = F.ATTITUDE_ID) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND A.cn = #userId# GROUP BY A.DISPLAYNAME,A.TITLE,A.DESCRIPTION,A.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2,C.TYPE_ID,D.TYPE_NAME,C.ATTITUDE_ID,C.CONTENT,C.MODAPPL, C.START_DATE,C.END_DATE, NVL(F.ANNUAL_APPR_STATUS, -1),F.ANNUAL_DOC_ID
ORDER BY $orderCell$ $orderOption$
ORDER BY startDate

SELECT A.CN AS userId, A.DISPLAYNAME$primary$ AS userName, A.TITLE$primary$ AS userTitle, A.DESCRIPTION$primary$ AS userDeptName, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS companyId, (NVL(B.MONTHLY_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + NVL(B.ANNUAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0) + NVL(B.ADDITIONAL_HOLIDAY_CNT, 0)) AS totalAnnualCnt, NVL((SUM( TRUNC( TO_DATE( CASE WHEN C.END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) > TO_DATE(#searchEndTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN #searchEndTime# ELSE TO_CHAR(NVL(C.END_DATE, C.START_DATE) + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') - TO_DATE( CASE WHEN C.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#searchStartTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') THEN #searchStartTime# ELSE TO_CHAR(C.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') END , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 0)) + SUM( CASE WHEN TYPE_ID = 'A11' THEN 1 WHEN TYPE_ID = 'A12' THEN 0.5 WHEN TYPE_ID = 'A13' THEN 0.5 ELSE 0 END )), 0) AS useAnnualCnt FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL B ON (A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = B.USER_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE C ON (A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = C.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = C.WRITER_ID AND (C.TYPE_ID = 'A11' OR C.TYPE_ID = 'A12' OR C.TYPE_ID = 'A13') AND C.MODAPPL <> '5' AND ( ( C.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#searchStartTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND C.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) <= TO_DATE(#searchEndTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) OR ( C.END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#searchStartTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND C.END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) <TO_DATE(#searchEndTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) OR ( C.START_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) < TO_DATE(#searchStartTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND C.END_DATE + #offsetMin# / (24 * 60) >= TO_DATE(#searchEndTime#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ) ) ) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND A.CN = #userId#
GROUP BY A.CN, A.DISPLAYNAME$primary$, A.TITLE$primary$, A.DESCRIPTION$primary$, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, nvl(B.TOTAL_ANNUAL_CNT, 0)

SELECT USER_ID AS USER_ID, ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT AS ORIGIN_ANNUAL_CNT, CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT AS CHANGE_ANNUAL_CNT, CHANGE_REASON AS CHANGE_REASON, TO_CHAR(CHANGE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHANGE_DATE, CHANGE_USER_ID AS CHANGE_USER_ID, (SELECT DISPLAYNAME$primary$ FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE CN = CHANGE_USER_ID AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) AS CHANGE_USER_NAME, COMPANY_ID AS COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM tbl_attitude_annual_history WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USER_ID = #userId# ORDER BY CHANGE_DATE DESC, ANNUAL_HISTORY_ID DESC

SELECT CN AS USER_ID, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, 0 AS JOIN_DATE FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
CN = #userId#
description$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchDeptName# || '%'
displayname$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchUserName# || '%'
title$primary$ LIKE '%' || #searchTitle# || '%'
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_attitude_annual (USER_ID, JOIN_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID) VALUES (#userId#, #date#, #companyId#, #tenantId#)
UPDATE tbl_attitude_annual SET JOIN_DATE = #date# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND USER_ID = #userId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT company_id, tenant_id, annual_cancel_rule, use_annual_auto_gnrt, annual_gnrt_std, TO_CHAR(initial_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS initial_date, use_minus_annual, use_annual_tmnt, round_off_rule, TO_CHAR(conf_set_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS conf_set_date FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CONF WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CONF ( COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, ANNUAL_CANCEL_RULE, USE_ANNUAL_AUTO_GNRT, ANNUAL_GNRT_STD, INITIAL_DATE, USE_MINUS_ANNUAL, USE_ANNUAL_TMNT, ROUND_OFF_RULE, CONF_SET_DATE ) VALUES ( #companyId#, #tenantId#, #annualCancelRule#, #useAnnualAutoGnrt#, #annualGnrtStd#, #initialDate#, #useMinusAnnual#, #useAnnualTmnt#, #roundOffRule#, TO_DATE(#confSetDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL_CONF SET annual_cancel_rule = #annualCancelRule#, use_annual_auto_gnrt = #useAnnualAutoGnrt#, annual_gnrt_std = #annualGnrtStd#, initial_date = #initialDate#, use_minus_annual = #useMinusAnnual#, use_annual_tmnt = #useAnnualTmnt#, round_off_rule = #roundOffRule#, conf_set_date = TO_DATE(#confSetDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND company_id = #companyId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.CN AS USER_ID, A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME AS COMPANY_ID, A.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, ifnull(TO_DATE(B.JOIN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), 0) AS JOIN_DATE FROM TBL_USERMASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_ATTITUDE_ANNUAL B ON (A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = B.COMPANY_ID AND A.CN = B.USER_ID) WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# AND A.CN = #userId#
